note: Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object MoQ relay (sub-second live media). CONSUMES the engine R4 metering contract by mirroring it in TS (src/wave-usage.ts) — the edge can't link the C++ core, so every MoQ usage event has the SAME wave.usage shape as native adapters → one billing/observability path.
